headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on Healthpeak Properties, Raises Price Target to $19
summary: UBS   maintains Healthpeak Properties (NYSE:DOC) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $17 to $19.

headline: Baird Maintains Outperform on Healthpeak Properties, Raises Price Target to $21
summary: Baird  analyst Amanda Sweitzer   maintains Healthpeak Properties (NYSE:DOC) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $19 to $21.
